name: move_scout_area
description: Move in a random direction for exploration and threat scanning
parameters: z.object({ maxDistanceBlocks: z.number().int().min(1).max(100).default(20).describe("Maximum distance to travel from the starting point"), maxDurationMs: z.number().int().min(1000).max(60000).default(5000).describe("Total active time allow for the scouting activity"), scanForHostiles: z.boolean().default(true).describe("Whether to interrupt movement if a hostile is detected nearby"), scanForItems: z.boolean().default(true).describe("Whether to interrupt movement if a dropped item is detected nearby"), detectionRadiusBlocks: z.number().int().min(2).max(32).default(16).describe("Radius in blocks for detection scanning") })

name: scout_random_direction
description: Move randomly in one direction for 20 blocks max 60 ticks to scan for items and threats, then regroup with teammate
parameters: z.object({ maxDistanceBlocks: z.number().int().min(1).max(64).default(20).describe("Maximum distance to move away from current position"), maxScoutDurationMs: z.number().int().min(1000).max(10000).default(3000).describe("How long to scout in the random direction before returning"), teammateName: z.string().describe("The name of the teammate to regroup with after scouting"), stopOnDiscovery: z.boolean().default(true).describe("Whether to stop scouting immediately if a threat or item is spotted") })
